name: Nora Mill Grits (White or Yellow)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup NORA MILL stone ground grits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring salt and water to a boil.
2. Gradually stir in the grits while maintaining the boiling temperature.
3. Return the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve hot. Optionally, top with a pat of butter and a little milk if desired.
(If needed, adjust the amount of water to achieve the desired consistency.)
